CMS Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) Data Dictionary
Assessment — Minimum Data Set (MDS) File
Version — April 2026
Variable sequence Short SAS name Long SAS name Label Type Length Description Codes Comments
1 BENE_ID BENE_ID Encrypted 723 Beneficiary ID CHAR 15 A unique CCW beneficiary identifier field that is specific to the Chronic Condition Warehouse. This field is encrypted prior to delivery to researchers. The BENE_ID field is used to cross-reference data for each beneficiary across all
